_source: NYC Open Data 'DOHMH Farmers Markets' (Socrata, data.cityofnewyork.us, resource 8vwk-6iz2). Real records trimmed to the fields the client reads. The published data freezes at year 2025 (no 2026 yet), so the client filters to the latest available `year`. daysoperation/hoursoperations are free text; the included rows exercise the parser (single day, multi-day, no-space '9a.m.', year-round vs seasonal).
